So the project has:
1. A main project that uses Bun (`bunfig.toml`, `bun.lock`) — no test framework configured in the root `package.json`
2. A `desktop/` subproject that uses vitest with `@testing-library/react` and jsdom — this has `"test": "vitest"` script.

The main project root doesn't have a test script configured. There's no test runner installed in the root's `node_modules/.bin/`.
